item.title: JPMorgan Aims for China Approval of Active ETF Launch This Year
item.author: Bloomberg News (English)
item.description: JPMorgan Chase & Co. is working toward getting approval from Chinese securities regulators to launch actively managed exchange-traded funds in the country for the first time. “Our expectation is that this year we will get permission to be able to do that,” George Gatch, global chief executive officer of JPMorgan’s asset management unit, said during an interview in Toronto.
